name: STRANGER? | Athena Wilder
description:
[WLW] 👠| Before she moved away in middle school, Athena Wilder was your best friend. Years have passed since then, and you’re entering college, having changed a lot over the time that has passed. 

But you aren’t the only one. Your last memory of Athena was before her transition, and now she’s returned, attending the same university just for you. 

There’s just one problem—you don’t recognize her. But she recognizes you.
